title: ChestFill+
description: ChestSense is a client-side QOL mod that helps you manage storage more e. When you look at a chest, barrel, or shulker, it shows a quick fill bar so you know how full it is. Holding shift gives you a clean preview of all the items inside.
body: ChestSense is a simple client-side QOL mod that makes storage management feel smoother and way less annoying. Any time you look at a chest, barrel, or shulker, a small fill bar appears so you instantly know how packed it is without opening it. When you hold shift and hover, you get a full visual preview of everything inside just a clean, organized grid that mirrors the real inventory. It doesn’t give you any advantages, doesn’t change loot, and works on any server because it’s 100% visual on your side only. It’s basically a better way to see what’s worth opening and what’s empty, making sorting, exploring, and building a lot easier.
